sentences.jp: 店は小さくて静かです。
sentences.en: The shop is small and quiet.
Beside me, there is a person.
The person is reading a book.

sentences.jp: 人は「いい本ですね」と言います。
sentences.en: The person says, "It is a good book, isn't it."

sentences.jp: 店で本を読みたいです。
sentences.en: I want to read books at the shop.
I want to see the person.

sentences.jp: 風と一緒に、私は待ちます。
sentences.en: Together with the wind, I wait.

sentences.jp: 「これはいい本です」と本の店の人は言います。
sentences.en: "This is a good book," the shop person says.

sentences.jp: 池のそばに、本の店があります。
sentences.en: Beside the pond, there is a bookshop.

sentences.jp: 店の人は「明日も来ます」と言います。
sentences.en: The shop person says, "I will come tomorrow too."
I look at the white clouds.
